name: @maw-rs/wasm-sdk
description: AssemblyScript SDK shim for maw-rs WASM plugins

scripts.build:fixtures: mkdir -p ../../examples/wasm-parity/trivial/dist ../../crates/maw-plugin-manifest/tests/fixtures/wasm-parity/trivial && npm run build:trivial && cp ../../examples/wasm-parity/trivial/dist/plugin.wasm ../../crates/maw-plugin-manifest/tests/fixtures/wasm-parity/trivial/plugin.wasm && node scripts/write-fixture-metadata.mjs ../../crates/maw-plugin-manifest/tests/fixtures/wasm-parity/trivial/plugin.wasm ../../crates/maw-plugin-manifest/tests/fixtures/wasm-parity/trivial/metadata.json
